name: Korean BBQ Beef
recipeIngredient: 2 lb Beef sirloin tips; cut into
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients in a bowl and marinate for at least 2 hours.
2. Cook the beef on the grill as kebabs or stir-fry by itself.
3. If sirloin tips are unavailable, use flank steak, which tastes similarly.
4. For added heat, substitute hot pepper sesame oil and include cayenne pepper.
5. The sugar helps the beef caramelize; cane sugar can be used but may not caramelize as well.
